title: calibration record
description: One record per calibration of an L3 (LLM-as-judge) grader against L2 (human) ratings. Recipes append to a calibration log alongside calibration.md; the log is what the harness machine-reads to decide whether to deploy an L3 grader.

judge_id.description: Refers to a grader in graders.yaml.

judge_model.description: The exact judge model used for this calibration run. If the recipe later swaps judge_model, calibration must be repeated.

sample_size.description: How many traces were rated by both human and judge for this calibration. Hamel guidance: a few dozen is enough for first-pass calibration; high-stakes recipes go higher.

agreement.description: Fraction of items where the judge and human agreed.

cohen_kappa.description: Cohen's kappa for chance-corrected agreement. Recommended; not strictly required.

divergence_breakdown.description: Per-dimension or per-failure-mode breakdown of where the judge disagreed with the human.

deployed.description: Whether this calibration result was good enough to deploy the judge. Set by the harness based on max_divergence_from_l2.

notes.description: Free-form. Why the calibration was run, anything surprising in the disagreements, plans for the next iteration.
